content:
# Polyzwitterion

**Summary**: Polymers containing both positive and negative charges in the same molecule.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-musa|Musa, 2015]] synthesized cross-linked polyzwitterions (CPZ) as a base for water treatment materials.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-musa|Musa, 2015]] Zwitterionic polymers offer structural flexibility and stability for heavy metal adsorption.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-musa|Musa, 2015]] Characterized via FTIR and NMR.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Polymer 3 (CPZ) was synthesized with a yield of 49% using monomer 1 and cross-linker 2. ([[2015-musa|Musa, 2015, p. 36]])
